channel.title: Test Podcast with Person Tags
channel.description: A test podcast for validating podcast:person parsing.

item.title: Episode 1: Deep Dive with Sam Harris
item.description: A deep conversation with Sam Harris about consciousness.

item.description: Exploring artificial intelligence with a special guest.

item.title: Episode 3: Solo Thoughts
item.description: Solo episode with no guests tagged.
